title: croton lagunillae
intro: Croton lagunillae is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Lagune croton or Lagune bush. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Croton lagunillae include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and poultices, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
